description: A vibrant cubist-style collage painting featuring a cash register at center, depicted with its circular keys and mechanical parts fragmented and rearranged. The composition is filled with numbers (52, 21, 45), letters (U, KR), text fragments (BARRETT), geometric shapes — triangles, circles, rectangles — in bold primary colors of red, blue, yellow, black, and white. Various mechanical and commercial objects overlap and intersect in the flat, compressed picture plane characteristic of synthetic cubism.
